original_definition.skill_description: Instructions for using LangChain with Python Triggers on: **/*.py

actions.name: LangChain's `Runnable` interface is the foundation for compo
actions.description: LangChain's `Runnable` interface is the foundation for composing and executing chains, chat models, output parsers, retrievers, and LangGraph graphs.

actions.name: All major LangChain components (chat models, output parsers,
actions.description: All major LangChain components (chat models, output parsers, retrievers, graphs) implement the Runnable interface.

actions.name: Batching (`batch`, `batch_as_completed`) is optimized for pa
actions.description: Batching (`batch`, `batch_as_completed`) is optimized for parallel API calls; set `max_concurrency` in `RunnableConfig` to control parallelism.

actions.name: Input/output types are component-specific (e.g., chat models
actions.description: Input/output types are component-specific (e.g., chat models accept messages, retrievers accept strings, output parsers accept model outputs).

actions.name: Compose Runnables declaratively with LCEL: `chain = prompt |
actions.description: Compose Runnables declaratively with LCEL: `chain = prompt | chat_model | output_parser`.

actions.name: Propagate `RunnableConfig` (tags, metadata, callbacks, concu
actions.description: Propagate `RunnableConfig` (tags, metadata, callbacks, concurrency) automatically in Python 3.11+; manually in async code for Python 3.9/3.10.

actions.name: Configure runtime attributes and alternatives with `configur
actions.description: Configure runtime attributes and alternatives with `configurable_fields` and `configurable_alternatives` for dynamic chains and LangServe deployments.

actions.name: Use tags and metadata in `RunnableConfig` for tracing in Lan
actions.description: Use tags and metadata in `RunnableConfig` for tracing in LangSmith and debugging complex chains.

actions.name: For custom logic, wrap functions with `RunnableLambda` or `R
actions.description: For custom logic, wrap functions with `RunnableLambda` or `RunnableGenerator` instead of subclassing.

actions.name: Prompt templates: store templates under `prompts/` and load
actions.description: Prompt templates: store templates under `prompts/` and load via a safe helper. Keep templates small and testable.

actions.name: Memory: default to stateless design. When memory is needed,
actions.description: Memory: default to stateless design. When memory is needed, store minimal context and document retention/erasure policies.

rules.description: Create custom runnables with `RunnableLambda` (simple transforms) or `RunnableGenerator` (streaming transforms); avoid subclassing directly.
